body:
Hey Amara — following up on our conversation from last week and wanted to give you a quick update before we finalize the deck. [GreenPulse](companies/greenpulse) just closed out our pilot with the Port of Rotterdam, and the emissions-monitoring data we pulled over 90 days exceeded our projections by about 18%, which we think really anchors the unit economics story. On the team front, I'm still serving as CEO and leading the fundraise directly, so all diligence conversations can flow through me without any additional overhead. I know you mentioned [Halfway Capital](firms/halfway-capital) has a strong view on founding team continuity at the seed stage, so I wanted to make that clear. Looking forward to connecting Thursday if you're still free — let me know if anything has shifted on your end.

— Dev
